items.name: find_and_capture_adp
items.signature: pub(crate) fn find_and_capture_adp(window_title: &str) -> Result<(u64, RgbImage), AppError>
items.doc: Finds a window by partial title and captures its bitmap.

items.name: decode_template_adp
items.doc: Decodes a base64 PNG/JPEG template into an RgbImage.

items.name: after_screenshot_adp
items.signature: pub(crate) fn after_screenshot_adp(hwnd: u64) -> Result<String, AppError>
items.doc: Captures `hwnd` after an action and returns it as a base64 PNG string.

items.name: encode_png
items.doc: Encodes an RgbImage to raw PNG bytes.
